Wall Street stocks stall, London hits record high Wall Street stocks dipped Thursday while London hit a record high as investors remain optimistic overall that governments will reach deals to avoid US tariffs.All three of Wall Street's main indices quickly slipped into the red, a day after the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite set fresh record highs thanks to a surge in US chip titan Nvidia that pushed the firm to a record $4 trillion valuation at one point.
